chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-2707 of 2022 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For order on office objection. 2.For hearing of CMA No.31093/2022 3.For hearing of CMA No.12030/2022 4.For hearing of CMA No.12031/2022 5.For hearing of main case. 10.03.2025 Mr.Fawad Hussain Chand, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.M.Bilal Bhatti, Advocate for Respondent. Essentially, the petition assails the quantum of a property tax directly in writ jurisdiction. No cavil is articulated with respect to the assessment etc.; irrespective that the same ought to be assailed in statutory jurisdiction. Additionally, the petitioner seeks that an inquiry may be conducted by the Court in respect of his allegations. Admittedly, this raises the factum of disputed questions of fact that could not be addressed without recourse to investigation. Evidence etc., and prima facie the same does not merit adjudication in writ jurisdiction. In view hereof, this petition, being misconceived, is dismissed. Judge Judge nasir
